system.powerDescription:
For the remainder of the scene you may extend or fire sharp spikes of bone up to 1/2 CAT distance away from you. These spikes may be extended/retracted harmlessly, be used to dig into/climb surfaces, or to damage enemies. These bones have 1/2 CAT effectiveness when used as weapons and are still considered mundane for the purposes of harming supernatural creatures. 

Gain or grant +1D when you or an ally next take advantage of this power. This power may alter the parameters of rolls whilst active.
